faqs.question: What does rodent proofing include for East Meadow homes?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive rodent proofing service includes a detailed inspection of your East Meadow property to identify all potential entry points, sealing gaps and cracks in foundations, walls, and rooflines with professional-grade materials, installing door sweeps and vent covers, and providing recommendations for ongoing prevention. We focus on long-term exclusion to keep mice and rats out permanently.

Rodent proofing protects your home from property damage, health risks, and the stress of recurring infestations while increasing your property value and providing peace of mind.
